##MEMBER IEASVC00
/********************************************************************/  00010001
/*                                                                  */  00010002
/*  Member = IEASVC00                                                */  00010003
/*                                                                  */  00010004
/*  Function =                                                      */  00010005
/*    This member of SYS1.PARMLIB is used to add or replace          */  00010006
/*    user SVC routines during system initialization.                */  00010007
/*                                                                  */  00010008
/*  Sample statement =                                               */  00010009
/*                                                                  */  00010010
/* SVCPARM 254,REPLACE,TYPE(1),APF(NO)                   IMS    SVC  */ 00010003
/*                                                                  */  00010012
/********************************************************************/  00010013
 SVCPARM 200,REPLACE,TYPE(3),APF(YES)                                   00020001
 SVCPARM 201,TYPE(1)                                                    00020002
